citation_and_locator: Fan, Xiaolei. 2024. 香港粵語“有 VP”的時體意義——兼論普通話的“沒”. Current Research in Chinese Linguistics 103(1):1-30; pp. 4-10, examples 4 and 6-9
what_it_supports: Classifies `住` as static continuous and `緊` as dynamic progressive; gives maintained `掛住`, main-clause contrasts, subordinate/accompanying `唱住` and `食住飯睇書`, and irrealis temporary `V住…先`.
limit: The paper's theoretical nominalization/stativity analysis and selected judgments do not establish a universal predicate classifier, unrestricted productivity, or all speaker varieties.

citation_and_locator: Kataoka, Shin. 2018. 從早期和現代語料看粵語進行體標記“緊”在複句中的功能. Current Research in Chinese Linguistics 97(1):133-141; p. 134, examples 3-4
what_it_supports: Direct minimal contrast: `着緊` is the dressing event in progress; `着住` is the maintained wearing state.
limit: The paper focuses on `緊`; one contrast does not establish every `住` predicate, object, or clause environment.

citation_and_locator: Matthews, Stephen, and Virginia Yip. 2011. Cantonese: A Comprehensive Grammar companion, chapter 11, section 11.2.3
what_it_supports: Labels `住` continuous and gives transitive `我想以後成日陪住你`.
limit: One curated example does not establish unrestricted transitive productivity or a full argument-structure inventory.
